case_title: SUSANNE BROWN VS. CAPITAL ACCESS GROUP, INC.

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO DAVID MCDONALD FILED BY BROWN, SUSANNE CAPITAL ACCESS GROUP, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-06-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-06-2011 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$NONE GIVEN) SERVED AUG-10-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CAPITAL ACCESS GROUP, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-06-2011 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY BROWN, SUSANNE AS TO DEFENDANT CAPITAL ACCESS GROUP, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-06-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON 05/29/2024 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CAPITAL ACCESS GROUP, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BROWN, SUSANNE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CAPITAL ACCESS GROUP, INC. COURT FINDS THAT WITHOUT SOME FORM OF WRITTEN AGREEMENT, PLAINTIFF DOES NOT HAVE A CLAIM FOR A BROKER FEE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-03-2012 ORDERED DESTROYED
